---
title: "Hollywood Crime Pattern Analysis Report"
author: "Nakul Bhatia, Justin Kin, Nikolai Cupid"
date: "May. 2, 2026"
date-modified: now
format: pdf
execute: 
  echo: false
---

## Introduction

## Data

### Data Provenance

### FAIR and CARE Principles

## Case and Attribute Description

## Explortory Data Analysis

## Conclusion

## Author Contribution

## References

## Code Appendix
